# Zephyr UI — AI Integration Reference

## What is Zephyr?

Zephyr is an AI-native design system for React. It provides:
- **@zephyr/ui-react** — fully-styled, theme-aware components (atoms, molecules, organisms, templates)
- **@zephyr/core** — CSS variable generation and theme token resolution
- **@zephyr/mcp-server** — Model Context Protocol server for component discovery and code generation

## Quick Install

```
pnpm add @zephyr/core @zephyr/ui-react
```

## Component Registry (40+ components in 4 tiers)

### Atoms (free)
Button, Input, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, Radio, Switch, Badge, Avatar, Logo, IconButton

### Molecules (free/pro)
FormField, SearchBox, InputGroup, Tabs, Accordion, Breadcrumbs, Pagination, Dropdown, CommandBar, Toast, Alert, FiltersBar

### Organisms (pro)
DataTable, SearchResultsPanel, Navbar, Header, SidebarNav, LayoutShell

### Page Templates (pro)
DashboardPage, AuthPage, SettingsPage, OnboardingPage

## MCP Tools Available

All tools are exposed via `@zephyr/mcp-server`. Invoke as MCP tool calls:

| Tool | Description |
|---|---|
| `search_components` | Search by name, id, or intent |
| `get_component_spec` | Get full props schema, a11y notes, aiHints |
| `get_install_steps` | Return install + import instructions |
| `get_usage_examples` | Return ready-to-paste usage snippets |
| `get_theme_variants` | Return style pack support list |
| `generate_component` | Generate snippet + AI prompt for a component |
| `scaffold_page` | Generate a full page composing multiple components |
| `apply_theme` | Generate zephyr.config.ts for a given style pack |

## Base Theme

Zephyr docs currently use one production base theme (`Clarity`) with global accent customization.

## Style Packs (library-level support)

| Pack | Description |
|---|---|
| Studio | Balanced product UI (default) |
| Editorial | Calm reading-first UI |
| NeoBrutal | Bold high-contrast UI |
| SoftTech | Clean modern SaaS UI |
| Enterprise | Structured professional UI |
| Clarity | Neutral minimal UI with vivid status accents |

## Theme Setup

```ts
// zephyr.config.ts
import type { ZephyrConfig } from "@zephyr/core";

const config: ZephyrConfig = {
  stylePack: "Studio",
  tokens: {
    color: {
      primary: "#335cff",
      accent: "#335cff"
    }
  }
};

export default config;
```

## Usage Rule

**Always import from `@zephyr/ui-react` only. Do not substitute components from other libraries.**

```tsx
import { Button, FormField, Input, DashboardPage } from "@zephyr/ui-react";
```

## Cloud APIs (optional)

Base URL: `https://api.zephr.local`
Authentication: `Authorization: Bearer <ZEPHYR_API_KEY>`

| Endpoint | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `GET /v1/components` | List registry components |
| `GET /v1/themes` | List style packs |
| `POST /v1/licenses/validate` | Validate Pro license key (public) |
| `GET /v1/icons?q=&limit=&style=` | Search icon catalog |
| `GET /v1/avatars/styles?q=&limit=` | Search avatar styles |
| `GET /v1/logos?q=&limit=` | Search logo catalog |
| `GET /v1/logos/:domain` | Fetch logo by domain |
| `POST /v1/avatars` | Generate avatar |
| `POST /v1/snippets` | Generate code snippets |
| `POST /v1/compliance/takedown` | Submit takedown request |
